preview.canonicalTitle: cross-viewport UI reliability and layout hardening
preview.canonicalBody:
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:START -->
ATLAS-CARD-ID: `mazer-cross-viewport-ui-reliability`
- project: `Mazer`
- type: `feature`
- state: `review`
- priority: `High`
- owner: `Mazer`
- progress: `97%`
- autonomous implementation: `not_admitted`
- updated: `2026-07-15T23:58:25.000Z`

## Summary
Coordinate mobile safe-area, shared overlay geometry, and browser layout through one no-overlap contract and proof matrix.

## Objective
- Make menu, Options, play, and Pause remain readable and operable across phone, browser, PWA, and restored-window surfaces without per-screenshot offsets.

## Acceptance criteria
- Every primary Mazer surface has an owner, supported viewport category, and no-overlap contract.
- Mobile and browser layout work can be verified independently and together through a shared matrix.
- No completion claim relies on deterministic browser proof alone for a physical-phone defect.
- Physical-device findings remain open until operator screenshots confirm the deployed behavior.

## Discoveries
- Exact preview dpl_HAcz3TXAnQUca929gqnzHQ87rH7Y was promoted as production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG.
- The public production 390x844 at 3x surface matrix passed all layout, containment, overlap, scroll, height-parity, console, and page-error gates.

## Next actions
- Collect operator production iPhone screenshots across menu, Options, play, and Pause with Smart Steering feel notes.
- Complete installed-PWA and native browser-chrome/maximize proof before completion.

## Blockers
- Operator physical-iPhone review remains outstanding.

## Evidence
- Mazer draft PR #76 at exact head 8ca79d9a843213cecab4eb8bb6963ed2078db603.
- Production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG is Ready at https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
- Public production capture C:\ATLAS\tmp\captures\mazer-ui-surfaces\2026-07-15T23-54-36-177Z\report.md passed with zero console warnings, page errors, or production error logs.
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:END -->

preview.canonicalTitle: normalize browser UI layout across viewports
preview.canonicalBody:
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:START -->
ATLAS-CARD-ID: `mazer-browser-layout-persistence`
- project: `Mazer`
- type: `feature`
- state: `review`
- priority: `High`
- owner: `Mazer`
- progress: `96%`
- autonomous implementation: `not_admitted`
- updated: `2026-07-15T23:58:26.000Z`

## Summary
Normalize responsive browser geometry and preserve only semantic settings so viewport changes cannot replay stale layout.

## Objective
- Recompute all menu, Options, play, and Pause geometry from the active content rectangle while preserving explicit player preferences only.

## Acceptance criteria
- Layout-derived geometry is never persisted as player preference state.
- A recalculated layout cannot overlap, escape the viewport, or hide essential controls.
- Normal reload preserves supported semantic settings with safe migration defaults.
- Narrow, wide, phone, and restore endpoints have deterministic evidence.

## Discoveries
- Public production serves exact head 8ca79d9a through Ready deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG.
- The production verifier passed text containment, overlap, scroll reachability, fade clearance, button fill, height parity, and runtime health.

## Next actions
- Inspect the production release through physical iPhone browser chrome.
- Retain native maximize/restore proof as a separate remaining endpoint.

## Blockers
- Physical browser-chrome and native maximize/restore proof remain outstanding.

## Evidence
- Exact product and PR head 8ca79d9a843213cecab4eb8bb6963ed2078db603.
- Production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG is Ready at https://fawxzzy-mazer.vercel.app.
- Public production capture C:\ATLAS\tmp\captures\mazer-ui-surfaces\2026-07-15T23-54-36-177Z\report.md passed.
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:END -->

preview.canonicalTitle: shared menu and play run status panel
preview.canonicalBody:
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:START -->
ATLAS-CARD-ID: `mazer-shared-run-status-panel`
- project: `Mazer`
- type: `feature`
- state: `review`
- priority: `High`
- owner: `Mazer`
- progress: `40%`
- autonomous implementation: `not_admitted`
- updated: `2026-07-15T23:58:27.000Z`

## Summary
Use one responsive menu and play status component for time, Rank or AI Rank, Score out of 100, and Maze level from the correct context.

## Objective
- Give menu and active play the same compact status language while keeping score authority traceable to the canonical scorer.

## Acceptance criteria
- Menu and play consume the same status-panel formatting and layout contract.
- Panel text remains centered, contained, and readable at phone and desktop widths.
- Panel width, gap, and play Pause placement satisfy shared viewport diagnostics.
- Displayed score is traceable to canonical run-quality data rather than a presentation-only calculation.

## Discoveries
- The shared 62px status panel and equal-height Pause control are live from exact head 8ca79d9a.
- Canonical scorer authority remains a distinct non-terminal dependency.

## Next actions
- Confirm menu and play status sizing in operator production screenshots.
- Consume the finalized canonical 0-to-100 scorer field before completion.

## Blockers
- Operator physical-phone proof and canonical scorer authority remain outstanding.

## Evidence
- Mazer draft PR #76 at exact head 8ca79d9a843213cecab4eb8bb6963ed2078db603.
- Production deployment dpl_CeenpiXMo9m6tmB9nZXpSia4vAQG is Ready.
- Public production status/Pause geometry passed at 62px/62px with no overlap or runtime errors.
<!-- ATLAS-CARD:END -->
